subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of God, daughter of His handmaid and sister of His handmaidens! Jinab-i-Ibn-i-Ismu'llah, upon him be the Glory of the All-Glorious [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله و بنت امته و اخت امته جناب ابن اسم الله علیه بهاء الله الابهی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @thankfulness; gratitude, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
